# VGEC — Victorian Geothermal Energy Company

> Victorian Geothermal Energy Company (VGEC) is developing the Koroit Geothermal Power Project — a next-generation geothermal energy resource in South-Western Victoria, Australia.

VGEC holds a 100%-owned Geothermal Retention Lease (GRL007012) over the Koroit Hot Sedimentary Aquifer, which has the potential to generate over 1,400 MW of renewable baseload electricity for 30+ years. The project benefits from a naturally fractured sandstone reservoir requiring no hydraulic fracturing, extensive existing geological data from petroleum exploration, and proximity to major transmission infrastructure. VGEC is led by experienced geologists and engineers with decades of geothermal and energy industry expertise.

## Pages

- Home: https://vgec.lovable.app/ - Overview of the Koroit Geothermal Power Project, company information, technology, resource details, development timeline, team, and contact
